## Summary

## Verification

- [ ] `swift build`
- [ ] `swift run agentglance-tests`
- [ ] `./scripts/build-app.sh`

## Security and privacy

- [ ] No credentials, personal session data, or generated artifacts are included.
- [ ] Changes to input handling, filesystem access, process execution, permissions, or integrations have tests.
- [ ] User-facing behavior and documentation are updated.
